concerns.text: Project Structure shows plots under data/processed/plots/ but spec.md FR-004 and quickstart.md Step 4 specify data/plots/. Output paths should be consistent across documents. (Per maintainer decision: use data/plots/ everywhere)

FR-006 requires computing correlation coefficients (Spearman/Pearson) and effect sizes (Cohen's d, r) for group comparisons. No explicit analysis step for correlation analysis exists in the plan's quickstart steps or project structure.

FR-007 requires derivation notes with formula citations and random seed values in docs/reproducibility/. Research.md mentions random_seeds.md but plan.md does not include this artifact in Project Structure or quickstart steps.

FR-011 requires documented tie-breaking rules for diagram representation ties with validation. No tie-breaking rules document or validation script appears in plan.md Project Structure or quickstart steps.

FR-013 requires hyperbolic volume consistency cross-check against KnotInfo with ≥90% match. No explicit step or output artifact for this cross-check appears in plan.md quickstart or Project Structure.

SC-009 requires descriptive comparison metrics (mean diff, variance ratio, Cohen's d) for alternating vs non-alternating groups. No explicit analysis step for group comparison metrics in plan.md quickstart or project structure.

SC-011 requires residual analysis identifying outlier knot families (≥2 std dev). No explicit step or output artifact (residual_analysis.md) for residual analysis in plan.md quickstart or Project Structure.
SC-014 requires hyperbolic volume cross-check documentation in hyperbolic_volume_validation.md. Research.md mentions this but plan.md does not include it in Project Structure or quickstart steps.
